query: In my stage-routing chatbot, when the user says 'I want to book a consultation' it just stays in the hub and never moves to the booking stage, even though the intent is obvious. The classifier works fine when I test the phrase alone. What's wrong?
expected_behavior: identify that the transition classifier is being fed the node's own freshly-generated acknowledging reply
explain that makes it read 'the current stage is already handling it' and return NONE
recommend classifying on the user's message + prior history only, excluding the just-generated reply
notes: Guards the route-on-intent wall: including the node's own reply in the classifier input suppresses routing.
